title: Extract auth middleware into composable pipeline
description: Created a composable middleware pipeline system in src/middleware/pipeline.ts with createMiddlewarePipeline function and pre-built pipelines (authenticatedRoute, instructorRoute, adminRoute, publicRoute). Each pipeline composes auth check → role guard in the correct order. Updated role-guard.ts to export RoleError interface. Added comprehensive tests covering pipeline composition, middleware ordering, and role-based access control.
